title: libtiff security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[4.0.9-36]
- fix CVE-2025-8176: prevent skipping first line in tiffdither and
  tiffmedian tools (RHEL-120230)
full_text:
[4.0.9-36]
- fix CVE-2025-8176: prevent skipping first line in tiffdither and
  tiffmedian tools (RHEL-120230)
